user.title: HA-Metric
user.description: Choose name, entities, and sensor update mode. Note: This only changes how often sensors refresh, not runtime counting accuracy.

custom.title: HA-Metric Custom
custom.description: Choose a custom sensor update interval in seconds.

error.unsupported_entities: At least one selected entity is unsupported. Allowed: lights, switches, media players, motion binary sensors, and measurement sensors with state_class=measurement.

init.title: HA-Metric Options
init.description: Add or remove tracked entities after setup. Note: Update mode affects sensor refresh only, not runtime accuracy.

custom.title: HA-Metric Custom
custom.description: Choose a custom sensor update interval in seconds.

error.unsupported_entities: At least one selected entity is unsupported. Allowed: lights, switches, media players, motion binary sensors, and measurement sensors with state_class=measurement.
